title: 12 PCS Helium Balloon Weights, Magnetic Balloon Weights Weight for Balloons Extra Strong(Clamping force 8 kg, Diameter 16 mm), Reusable Balloons Weight f or Party Wedding Birthday Christmas
features: 【balloon weights】 permanent magnet with hooks applicable on almost all metallic surfaces, no need for gluing, drilling or screwing.

【helium balloon weights】The small magnet is made of A3 iron shell, neodymium strong magnet and stainless steel hook. ; it is protected by a steel sleeve, which is not easy to break and has a long service life.
【balloon weights and ribbon】The surface has a three-layer coating of Ni+Cu+Ni, which has high corrosion resistance.
【balloon weight】The round magnet is attached to a threaded hook for easy removal and replacement with other products.
【weights for balloons】Each magnetic balloon weight can withstand 2kg of pulling force, which can firmly fix the helium balloons in place and prevent them from floating away.
description: You will receive Balloon Weights,Balloon Stand,Helium Balloon Weight,Magnetism Balloon Weight,Reusable balloon Weights for Party Wedding Birthday Christmas Halloween. Each Helium Balloon Weight measures only 1.3*3.1cm and weighs about 6g, making them easy to transport and use. Their small size ensures they won’t distract from your decorations while providing reliable support for your balloons. The magnet with hook can be easily installed without drilling. This magnetic hook can be easily removed when not in use. If you need a magnet to hold metal accessories, attach the magnet to the cord through the hole of the magnet. If you need to hang heavy objects with magnets, place the magnetic hooks on a smooth metal surface. If the items you received is defective, please inform us within 7 days upon receipt of item, we will replace another new one.
